title: LuminaraSMP
description: A Survival Modpack Made To Play Normal & Hardcore, to revive minecraft to it's new interesting Glory to play with you're Friends & Family.
body:
![LuminaraSMP Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7ae23ec1815a19e4a7205106e48bec0bb9053ddd.png)

# Introducing LuminaraSMP!

> Experience smooth gameplay, fast loading times, and a great performance that'll leave your game feeling addicting to play for hours on end! This modpack not only enhances performance but also includes shaders support!

## Why Should You Install LuminaraSMP?

> The goal of LuminaraSMP is to create a super easy way for people to play with Friends & Family  while providing just the most essential great features.

## Things in the LuminaraSMP Modpack You Definitly want!

> Sodium Optimization, Iris Shaders, Ambient Sounds, Bug Fixes Of Vanilla Minecraft, Terralith, Sound Physics Remastered, Presence Footsteps, Minimap, Falling Tree Etc!

## Simple VoiceChat In LuminaraSMP!
> Talk to ur Friends & Family In-Game and make it more fun and Realistic!

![Main Screen LuminaraSMP](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7e05f8d4f535181b126bab114c30f52074410363.png)

**LuminaraSMP doesn't add any additional content to the game, allowing for compatibility with most any world or server.**

**We are happy to help out for Support! [Discord Server.](https://discord.gg/CSa6prXW)**
